subject: Remove unused input fields that serve no calculation purpose
body:
Removed two input fields that were only used for display/metadata and
had no role in unit economics calculations:

1. activeBuyers (marketplace model) - Only returned in display metrics,
   never used in revenue/cost/margin/equilibrium calculations

2. unitLabel (usage-based model) - Purely descriptive text field with
   no mathematical use in calculations

This keeps the models clean and focused on essential unit economics inputs.
title: Remove unused input fields that serve no calculation purpose
